title: GraphQL Error
description: Schema describing a single error in a GraphQL response as defined by the GraphQL specification.

message.description: A human-readable description of the error.

locations.description: A list of locations in the GraphQL document associated with the error.

line.description: The line number (starting from 1) in the GraphQL document.

column.description: The column number (starting from 1) in the GraphQL document.

path.description: The path to the response field that experienced the error, using field names and list indices.

extensions.description: A map reserved for implementors to add additional error information.
